landing.title: A better you.
landing.subtitle: A spiritual companion for the modern Muslim. Grow steadily on your path toward Allah.

features.trackDesc: Record your good and bad deeds instantly with a simple, intuitive interface.
features.visualizeDesc: See your spiritual progress over time with beautiful charts and summaries.
features.secureDesc: Your data is yours alone. Securely authenticated and stored privately.

dashboard.subtitle: Let's get istiqomah, one deed at a time.
dashboard.startRecording: Start tracking your good and bad deeds to see your progress over time.
dashboard.noTargetsYet: Set spiritual goals to track your progress automatically

deed.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete this deed from your history.

createDeed.title: Record a New Deed
createDeed.subtitle: Track your good actions or mistakes to monitor your spiritual progress.
createDeed.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g., Helped a neighbor, Missed prayer...

dzikir.title: Dzikir Counter
dzikir.istighfarDesc: Tap the counter to record your istighfar. Each tap reduces bad deeds by 1 point.
dzikir.dzikirDesc: Tap the counter to record your dzikir. Each tap equals 1 point.
dzikir.dzikirReminder: SubhanAllah, Alhamdulillah, Allahu Akbar - Remember Allah often.
dzikir.tapCounterFirst: Tap the counter to add dzikir first.
dzikir.istighfarSavedDesc: {{count}} istighfar counted. Bad deeds reduced by {{count}} points.
dzikir.dzikirSavedDesc: {{count}} dzikir counted and saved as {{count}} points.

qibla.title: Qibla Compass
qibla.locationDesc: To find the direction to Mecca, we need your location. Tap the button below and allow location access when prompted.
qibla.allowLocation: Please allow location access when prompted by your browser.
qibla.step1: The green arrow points toward the Kaaba in Mecca
qibla.step2: Turn your body until facing the arrow direction
qibla.step3: For best accuracy, hold your device flat and away from metal objects

progress.title: Progress
progress.noDataDesc: Start recording your deeds to see your progress charts here.

targets.title: Targets
targets.subtitle: Set and track your spiritual goals
targets.noTargetsDesc: Set spiritual goals to track your progress automatically based on your deeds.
targets.targetValueDesc: Minimum points to achieve this period
targets.maxValueDesc: Maximum occurrences to stay within limit
targets.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently remove this target.
targets.noHistory: No history yet. Complete a period to see your past performance.
targets.achievementTypeDesc: Reach a minimum number of points for good deeds
targets.limitTypeDesc: Stay under a maximum limit for bad habits
